prototypes.title: TaskFlow
prototypes.description: A lightweight task management tool for small teams who find Jira overkill and Trello too basic. Real-time collaboration, smart deadlines, and zero setup time.
prototypes.problem: Most project tools are either bloated enterprise software or too simple for growing teams. Small teams need something powerful enough to track complex work but simple enough to actually use daily.
prototypes.targetUsers: Small engineering teams (5–20 people) and early-stage startups

features.title: Instant Setup
features.description: Create a workspace and invite your team in under 2 minutes. No onboarding calls required.

features.title: Smart Recurring Tasks
features.description: Define recurring patterns once. TaskFlow handles scheduling, reminders, and rollover automatically.

features.title: Burndown Charts
features.description: Visualize sprint progress without configuring a dashboard. Charts update in real time as tasks close.

features.title: GitHub Integration
features.description: Link PRs and commits to tasks. Status updates automatically when code ships.

advantages: Flat-rate pricing — no per-seat fees for small teams
5-minute setup vs. hours of Jira configuration
Built-in time tracking with no plugins
AI-suggested task breakdowns from plain-language descriptions
